provenance.source_corpus: Differential recovery of δ13C in multiple tissues of white sucker across age classes after the closure of a pulp mill

nodes.name: closure of the Mattagami River mill

source_spans.text: The Mattagami River mill was closed in 2006
13C was significantly depleted in 2011 compared with muscle from fish collected during the 1990s at MAT-DS
13C of gonad tissue of white sucker was not significantly different between MAT-US and MAT-DS
13C of opercular bone in white sucker captured at MAT-DS began drifting towards the value at MAT-US in 2007 and intersected the mean value of 13C at MAT-US in 2009
exposure to pulp mill effluent in all years
age of fish and 13C of tissues

edges.original_sentence: 13C was significantly depleted in 2011 compared with muscle from fish collected during the 1990s at MAT-DS, suggesting a change in their exposure to pulp mill effluent.
